cigaretteLicenseStep2.licenseeInformationDescription: Tell us about the business applying for this license.
cigaretteLicenseStep2.businessNameText: Enter the legal name of your business.
cigaretteLicenseStep2.tradeNameText: Enter the trade name of your business.
cigaretteLicenseStep2.responsibleOwnerNameText: Enter your full name exactly as it appears in the "Responsible Owner Name" section of your tax confirmation email.
cigaretteLicenseStep2.businessAddressDescription: Tell us where your business is located.
cigaretteLicenseStep2.mailingAddressDescription: Tell us where to send your license.
cigaretteLicenseStep2.mailingIsSameCheck: Mailing address is the same as the business address

mailingAddressLine1.label: Mailing Address Line 1
mailingAddressLine1.errorRequiredText: Enter your mailing addresss street name and number.
mailingAddressLine1.errorValidationText: Address Line 1 must be 35 characters or fewer.

mailingAddressLine2.errorValidationText: Address Line 2 must be 35 characters or fewer.
